# Santuario de Bienestar

> Comunidad espiritual en español sin dogmas para hispanohablantes que buscan reconectar con su esencia: alma, energía y consciencia.

## About
Santuario de Bienestar is a free Spanish-language spiritual wellness community hosted on Skool. It serves 25-45 year old Spanish speakers in Latin America who seek spiritual growth beyond conventional religion.

## Topics
- Spiritual wellness without dogma
- Chakras, Archangels, Ascended Masters
- Meditation and manifestation practices
- Monthly community challenges
- Energy healing for Spanish speakers

## Links
- [Community](https://www.skool.com/santuario-de-bienestar-7743)
- [Landing Page](https://santuario-landing-page.vercel.app)
